name: markov-max-bridge
description: Chord Markov Max devices: OSC bridge (Python backend) + in-process ONNX bridge

scripts.test: npm run test:bridge && npm run test:engine && npm run test:device && npm run test:fallback
scripts.test:bridge: node chord_parser.test.js && node performance_map.test.js && node backend_supervisor.test.js
scripts.test:engine: node engine/chord_vocab.test.js && node engine/notation.test.js && node engine/chord_simplifier.test.js && node engine/vocab.test.js && node engine/rng.test.js && node engine/neural_backend.test.js && node engine/neural_engine.test.js && node engine/markov_blend.test.js && node engine/phrase_engine.test.js && node engine/local_engine.test.js && node engine/local_engine_timeout.test.js
